properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v6 v8 v9

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I was stumbling around in amnesia, Not knowing the purpose for which I was born, By destiny, I heard the words of Elijah, I knew my Saviour’s voice and I was born; Born again, my heart has been turned back, Faith of my Father is now in my soul.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And now I know… I was born to be a supernova, A shining star in this hour; I was born to be a Supernova I was born to be a supernova, Reflecting God’s light and His power.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: As a child Satan sought me to devour, But my life was always protected by an unseen power; Greater was He that’s in me than the white horse rider, As my eagle wings of faith grew stronger and stronger; Now I’m risen far above the powers of deception, I have mounted the heavenly currents by revelation.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And now I know… I was born to be a supernova, A shining star in this hour; I was born to be a Supernova I was born to be a supernova, Reflecting God’s light and His power.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: From darkness I’ve been lifted to heavenly places, Amazing grace has taken me from unrighteousness; Born a star, I do delight in His glory, But what of my people who yet stumble in iniquity; Now in position, set in my course, I’ll reflect a light beam in their way, Oh, let the risen Son turn their darkness into day.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And now I know… I was born to be a supernova, A shining star in this hour; I was born to be a Supernova I was born to be a supernova, Reflecting God’s light and His power.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Queen Esther, your light is becoming brighter, Not many days now, you’ll display the King’s power; Rise and shine, oh let your light shine in this hour, Let this wicked world be shaken by a supernova.

verse.name: v8
v9
verse.lines: And now I know… I was born to be a supernova, A shining star in this hour; I was born to be a Supernova I was born to be a supernova, Reflecting God’s light and His power.
